name: translator-prototype

scripts.desktop:open: npm run build:electron && wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && electron . --dev-server=http://127.0.0.1:5173
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/package-win-portable.ps1
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:electron && vite build

description: Quiet Windows desktop translator for English-Chinese workflows.
author: Felyx-Fu
